description: Composition Blue and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm tab, a patch pocket on the left chest with embroidery and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery This shirt from wrangler is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
